description: Renovate is the single owner of dependency updates for this repo; keep repository-level (UI) Dependabot disabled.

Covers: GitHub Actions pins and Helm chart dependencies (charts/*/Chart.yaml). Chart dependencies are currently all local file://../common references, which Renovate correctly leaves alone — the helm manager is kept enabled so any future registry-backed dependency is picked up automatically.
First-party image tags in values-prd.yaml are release pins managed by the app release process, not third-party dependencies, so they are deliberately not managed here.
